name: Reality TV
description: Survivor to Real Housewives — three decades of unscripted television.

questions.q: What is Ozzy Osbourne's real first name?

source.notes: Full name: John Michael Osbourne. The Osbournes premiered on MTV in 2002.

questions.q: How many children are featured in the title of the reality show 'Jon & Kate Plus ___'?

source.notes: Twins + sextuplets = 8 kids. Show ran 2007–2017.

questions.q: Who was the original host of 'The Apprentice' (US)?

source.notes: Hosted 2004–2015 before running for president.

questions.q: Who was Jessica Simpson's husband on the reality show 'Newlyweds'?

source.notes: Newlyweds: Nick and Jessica aired on MTV 2003–2005.

questions.q: Which reality competition strands contestants on a remote island and divides them into tribes?

source.notes: Premiered on CBS in 2000.

questions.q: Which Dutch production company created Big Brother and exported the format worldwide?

source.notes: Endemol launched Big Brother in the Netherlands in 1999. Now Banijay-owned.

questions.q: In what year did 'The Bachelorette' premiere?

source.notes: Spin-off of The Bachelor; first lead was Trista Rehn.

questions.q: Which supermodel hosts 'America's Next Top Model' and coined the verb 'smize'?

source.notes: Smize = smile with the eyes.

questions.q: In which US state is the original 'Jersey Shore' set?

source.notes: Filmed in Seaside Heights, NJ.

questions.q: Which 'American Idol' judge was famous for the catchphrase 'It's a no from me, dawg'?

source.notes: Judge from 2002–2013.

questions.q: Which city does 'The Real Housewives of ____' set in the South have its title?

source.notes: Real Housewives of Atlanta premiered on Bravo in 2008.

questions.q: Which reality show popularized the phrase 'You're fired!'?

source.notes: Trump's signature firing line.

questions.q: Which MTV prank show was created by and starred Ashton Kutcher?
Which stunt-and-prank reality show is fronted by Johnny Knoxville?

source.notes: MTV series 2000–2002, plus several theatrical sequels.

questions.q: Which celebrity chef hosts 'Kitchen Nightmares' (and 'Hell's Kitchen', and 'MasterChef')?

source.notes: Original answer mis-spelled 'Ramsay'.

questions.q: Who has hosted 'American Idol' since its first season in 2002?

source.notes: Brian Dunkleman co-hosted Season 1; Seacrest has been continuous solo host since Season 2.

questions.q: Who is the long-running host of 'Survivor'?

source.notes: Hosting since Season 1 in 2000.

questions.q: Which long-time 'Top Chef' judge replaced Katie Lee as host in Season 2?

source.notes: Hosted Top Chef from Season 2 (2006) through Season 19 (2022).

questions.q: Who hosts 'RuPaul's Drag Race'?

source.notes: Premiered on Logo in 2009; moved to VH1 then MTV.

questions.q: On 'The Voice', what color do the coaches' chairs light up when they choose to turn around?

source.notes: The 'I Want You' button lights the chair red as it turns.
